[[File:Dragon mace detail.png|left|120px]]
The '''dragon mace''' is the fifth-strongest [[mace]] stat-wise after the [[Tzhaar-ket-em]], [[Sarachnis cudgel]], [[Viggora's chainmace]], and [[Inquisitor's mace]]. It can only be wielded by players who have an [[Attack]] level of at least 60 and who have completed the [[Heroes' Quest]].

The mace can be purchased for 50,000 coins at the [[Happy Heroes' H'emporium.|Happy Heroes' H'emporium]] in the [[Heroes' Guild]], or from other players. 

It can also be obtained as a reward from [[elite clue]]s and [[master clues]].

It can be upgraded to the [[Dragon mace (bh)]] with a [[Dragon mace imbue scroll]], which has a +4 increased stab and crush attack bonus. In addition, the special attack consumes only 15% special attack energy rather than 25%, and rolls against 60% of the target's crush defence rather than 100%. The upgraded version can only be used for [[PKing]] in the [[Bounty Hunter]] [[Minigames|minigame]].

As with most [[dragon equipment]], the dragon mace '''cannot''' be made from raw materials using the [[Smithing]] skill.

==Special attack==
[[File:Shatter.gif|frame|A player performing the dragon mace's special attack, ''Shatter''.]]
The dragon mace has a [[special attacks|special attack]] called ''Shatter'', which increases the player's accuracy by 25% and damage by 50%, while rolling against the target's crush defence. This attack consumes 25% of the player's special attack energy.
